# UC-15.5.1 · NVR Recording Gap Detection for Splunk CCTV Pipelines

> **Criticality:** Critical &middot; **Difficulty:** Intermediate &middot; **Pillar:** Observability &middot; **Type:** Availability, Physical Security &middot; **Status:** Verified

*We watch the physical data center for power, cooling, environment, and physical access.*

---

## Description

Missing video blocks investigations and compliance replay; health feeds expose scheduler or disk stalls before operators notice.

## Value

Preserves chain-of-custody confidence and SLA for retention.

## Implementation

(1) Ingest NVR health JSON every minute. (2) Map `recording_state`. (3) Alert on cumulative gap.

## SPL

```spl
index=physical sourcetype="nvr:recording_health" earliest=-48h
| eval cam=coalesce(camera_id, channel, "")
| eval gap_s=tonumber(coalesce(gap_seconds, recording_gap_s, ""))
| where gap_s>120 OR recording_state!="continuous_ok"
| stats sum(gap_s) as total_gap_s by cam nvr_name
```

## Visualization

Timeline gaps; table cameras worst gap.

## Known False Positives

Sensor anomalies during cleaning, calibration, or planned environmental changes.

## References

- [ONVIF — Open Network Video Interface Forum](https://www.onvif.org/)
- [Hikvision OpenAPI / ISAPI](https://www.hikvision.com/en/support/download/sdk/)
